name: pipeline-forecast
description: Pipeline intelligence plugin for Ironclad mid-market sales. Two modes: (1) /bootstrap-pipeline for first-time setup — creates Notion database and builds deep 90-day dossiers for every deal. (2) /run-forecast for weekly runs — reads prior Notion dossiers, looks back 7 days, updates incrementally. Both modes dispatch sub-agents with isolated context windows (one per deal) to prevent quality degradation across 30-40 deals. Also supports /analyze-deal for single-deal ad-hoc analysis.

connectors.name: Glean
connectors.purpose: Primary search layer for Salesforce opportunity records and Gong call transcripts. All Salesforce and Gong access is mediated through Glean filters (app:salescloud, app:gong).

connectors.name: Gmail
connectors.purpose: Searches email threads with deal contacts to surface pricing discussions, procurement engagement, champion sentiment, and new contacts not yet in Salesforce.

connectors.name: Google Calendar
connectors.purpose: Pulls completed and upcoming meetings per account to confirm Gong coverage, identify gaps, and validate next-step momentum.

connectors.name: Google Drive
connectors.purpose: Searches for deal-specific documents — decks, business cases, redlines, security questionnaires — to track artifacts produced during the cycle.

connectors.name: Notion
connectors.purpose: Hosts the Pipeline Intelligence and Closed Deals databases. Stores per-deal dossiers, changelog entries, and source links across runs. Required for /run-forecast — the weekly run refuses to start without an existing database.
